name: pi-esr
description: Engineering State Runtime — structured task tracking, state management, and DAG execution for coding agents. Turn every coding session into a queryable, auditable knowledge graph.

interface.shortDescription: Structured entity tracking, state management, and DAG execution for coding agents
interface.longDescription: ESR transforms every coding session into a queryable knowledge graph. Create entities (Actor, Artifact, Task, Concept, Constraint), track tasks through draft→active→stable lifecycle, link typed relations, execute DAGs, and recall past context with memory tools.
defaultPrompt: Use ESR actively for non-trivial work. At session start or before planning, call esr_get_context (or mcp__pi-esr__esr_get_context if Codex exposes the MCP-prefixed name). For real work, create a Task with esr_create_entity, move it draft -> active with esr_update_state, link dependencies/artifacts with esr_link_relation, record checks with esr_evaluate, and finish with esr_complete_task when possible.
